title: More Menu
heading: Administrative Setup
text:
# Administrative Setup

District is the main unit of the state. The District Collector & Magistrate is the administrator of the district . The most important work of the the District Collector is to maintain law and order, various rules and implementation of various govt. schemes. Being a top administrator of the district, he directly orders the police department whenever required. He is also responsible to maintain peace and justice in the district.
